voice_observations.caption_text:
The 𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐗 𝐆𝐀𝐌𝐄𝐒 are coming… and now’s your chance to test yourself before race day. 💪⚡️

Built around endurance, strength, speed, and grit — @apexgames.uae combines 4 running blocks with functional exercise zones that will push you to your limit. Every station counts. Every second matters. 👀

Join us at selected Fitness First clubs for our 𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐗 𝐅𝐈𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒 𝐓𝐄𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 sessions and find out where you stand. 🚀

📍 FITNESS FIRST THE PALM
🗓 Saturday 16th May
⏰ 12PM – 2PM

📍 FITNESS FIRST MUDON
🗓 Saturday 23rd May
⏰ 12PM – 2PM

📍 FITNESS FIRST MEDIA CITY
🗓 Saturday 30th May
⏰ 12PM – 2PM

Think you can handle the challenge? Come prove it. 😤🔥
#𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘𝐀𝐓𝐅𝐈𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐒𝐓 ❤️

#FitnessFirstMe #Aboveandbeyond #GoFurtherWithFitnessFirst #ApexGames
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hi, I'm Paul Downs with Apex Games and we're excited to have Fitness First as a founding gym partner for our inaugural event on June 6th in World Trade Center. In the lead up to the Apex Games, we'll be hosting dedicated fitness sessions across Fitness First clubs to prepare your athletes for competition. Now let's get into the race format. The course consists of four running blocks and three exercise blocks. After each run, athletes enter an exercise zone where they must complete a set of functional movements before progressing to the next run. Across the course, athletes will take on farmer's carry, burpee broad jumps, fan bike, chest carry, dead ball ground to overhead, row overhead plate carry, weighted walking lunges and ski machine. So ladies and gents, get ready to rise to your Apex. See you June 6th at Dubai World Trade Center.
